title: MusicX
tagline: Offline music player focused on speed and simplicity.
description: Offline music player focused on speed and simplicity.
longDescription: MusicX is an offline music player I built because I was tired of ads and bloated apps. It plays your local files, makes playlists, and just works. No accounts, no internet needed. Working on a v2 with some new ideas.
wiki:
No ads. No subscriptions. No accounts.
No Start Free Trial button stalking you.

--- ## Why I Built This Most music apps are doing the absolute most. Ads. Premium popups. Sign in to continue. Upgrade to unlock basic functionality. I just wanted to press play and hear music. So I made MusicX. It opens. It scans your songs. It plays them. --- ## What You Get - Fully offline playback - Local music scanning - Fast search for songs, artists, and metadata - Playlist support - Lyrics support through embedded lyrics and LRCLIB - Background playback - Lock screen and notification controls - Clean, minimal UI - Advanced color customization No streaming. No cloud. No tracking. No account creation side quest. --- ## Customization You can tweak pretty much every color in the app — backgrounds, text, accents, player UI, buttons, and more. If you want your music player pure black and minimal, you can. If you want it looking like a neon science experiment, you can also do that. --- ## How It Works - Scans your music using Android MediaStore - Everything stays on your device - Built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose - Uses Media3 / ExoPlayer for playback --- ## FAQ **Does it stream music?** No. Local files only. **Does it need internet?** Nope. **Are there ads?** Never. **Do I need an account?** Absolutely not. **Is my music uploaded anywhere?** No. It stays on your device. --- ## The Goal Open app, pick song, play music. That's it. No popups. No paywalls. No emotional manipulation to buy premium.
